summary: Iteration 12 testing complete - All 9 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified. Features tested: 1) POST /api/hr/salaries accepts overtime and bonus fields, 2) GET /api/hr/salaries returns overtime and bonus, 3) GET /api/deleted-items returns within 2 seconds, 4) GET /api/deleted-items only returns items with deleted_by field, 5) PUT /api/settings/personal-theme works for admin, 6) GET /api/invoices works, 7) Personal theme applies after platform theme in App.js (platformThemeLoaded state), 8) HR salary table shows overtime and bonus columns, 9) HR salary year filter is input[type=number], 10) Sidebar shows سجل المحذوفات link.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js (lines 53, 67, 91-95): platformThemeLoaded state correctly ensures personal theme applies AFTER platform theme is loaded
HRSalary model (lines 10975-10976): overtime:float=0 and bonus:float=0 fields correctly defined
HRManagement.js (lines 640-641): Salary table has وقت إضافي and مكافأة columns
HRManagement.js (line 465-466): Year filter is input[type=number] not select dropdown
HRManagement.js (lines 263-264, 303-307): Excel and PDF export include overtime and bonus columns
server.py (lines 11244-11245): deleted-items endpoint filters for deleted_by: {$exists: true}
server.py (line 11266): Reports projection only returns id, report_number, project, status, deleted_at, deleted_by for performance
Layout.js (lines 1198-1202, 1449-1459): Sidebar shows سجل المحذوفات link for users with trash permission
seed_data_creation: Test HR salaries created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 features fully tested. Key changes verified: 1) HRSalary model has overtime and bonus fields (float=0 default). 2) POST/GET /api/hr/salaries correctly handles overtime and bonus. 3) HR salary table shows وقت إضافي and مكافأة columns. 4) Year filter is input[type=number]. 5) Excel/PDF export includes overtime and bonus. 6) deleted-items endpoint is fast (<2s) and only returns items with deleted_by field. 7) App.js uses platformThemeLoaded state to ensure personal theme applies after platform theme. 8) Sidebar shows سجل المحذوفات link.

tests_performed.details: Salaries list includes overtime and bonus fields
Only returns items with deleted_by field
Table shows وقت إضافي and مكافأة columns
Year filter is input[type=number], not select
Modal includes وقت إضافي and مكافأة input fields
Personal theme useEffect depends on platformThemeLoaded state
الثيم الشخصي section visible with theme options
